---
format:
  revealjs:
    pdf-max-pages-per-slide: 1
    pdf-separate-fragments: false
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: print
    theme: "bea_slide_theme.scss"
    menu:
      side: right
      width: wide
---

##  {#title-slide data-menu-title="Title Slide" background="#9FB2AC"}

[Practical methods for competing risks data]{.custom-title}

[*A review*]{.custom-subtitle}

<hr style="border: 1px solid #5D0D18;">

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
[Beatriz Lima Silveira]{.custom-subtitle3}<br> [Felipe Mancini Ramos]{.custom-subtitle3}<br>
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
[Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais]{.custom-subtitle3} <br>
:::
:::::

::: title-footer
Slides disponíveis em [GitHub](https://github.com/beatriz-ls/practical-competing-risks){.cover-link}
:::

<br>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/1_topicos.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/2_introducao.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/3_introducao_sobrevivencia.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/4_teoria_hazard_cif.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/5_modelagem.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/6_analise_sensibilidade.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/7_resultados.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/8_conclusao.qmd >}}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< include sections/9_referencias.qmd >}}
